summary: Added exportRunLog(runId) that produces a Protocol Labs-style agent_log.json envelope with run metadata (run_id, agent_id, company_id, status, timing), usage summary (token/cost totals), and entries with log_id for traceability to persisted agent_execution_logs rows. Clean TypeScript interfaces (RunLogEntry, RunUsage, RunLogExport). 6 new tests.

codeQuality.structure: exportRunLog is well-structured: fetches run record, fetches scoped log rows, maps to Protocol Labs format. Entries are ordered ascending by created_at for correct chronological order. RunLogExport envelope provides comprehensive metadata.
codeQuality.security: No secrets exposed. Uses existing Supabase client. Data is read-only from the agent's perspective.
codeQuality.testCoverage: 6 tests covering: run-scoped envelope with metadata, summary and token usage, error on missing run, empty entries handling, log_id traceability, and module re-export.
codeQuality.patterns: Preserves existing exportAgentLog for agent-global exports. New function follows the same pattern. TypeScript interfaces are well-documented.
